state.name: Rhode Island
state.agency_full: Rhode Island Department of Environmental Management

documents.title: Remediation Regulations (RICRR 250-RICR-140-10-1)
documents.description: Primary Rhode Island regulations governing the remediation of contaminated sites. Sets cleanup standards for soil and groundwater organized by land use and receptor type.

documents.title: RI MS4 General Permit
documents.description: RIDEM-issued MS4 general permit for Rhode Island municipalities. Requires implementation of six minimum control measures and annual reporting.

documents.title: Construction General Permit (CGP) — Rhode Island
documents.description: RIDEM construction general permit for sites disturbing 1+ acres. Requires a Stormwater Pollution Prevention Plan addressing erosion, sedimentation, and post-construction management.

documents.title: RI Brownfields Program — Site Assessment Guidance
documents.description: RIDEM Brownfields Program resources for conducting Phase I and II ESAs in Rhode Island, including state-specific AAI requirements and voluntary cleanup program information.
